useful_deltas.summary: Added an announcement-time-aware dividend event boundary and conservative short-call assignment-risk exit to diagonal and bull-call debit simulators, with required-mode fail-close and bear-put isolation.
Made catalog semantics and simulator controls explicit for assignment-before-management precedence and below-extrinsic continuation.

critic_findings.finding: Diagonal and bull-call STRUCTURE_CATALOG entries lagged the provider-dependent assignment guard and exit precedence.
critic_findings.rationale: Both catalog entries now put early_assignment_risk first and state provider, honest-known_at, and non-dividend limitations; a catalog behavioral test locks the contract.

critic_findings.finding: Simulator integration only proved an extreme dividend exit and lacked a below-extrinsic continuation control.
critic_findings.rationale: A deterministic integration negative control now runs both simulators with a known tiny dividend and asserts zero assignment-risk exits.

critic_findings.finding: Assignment exit ordering preceded ordinary management in code but lacked a dedicated simultaneous profit-target precedence test.
critic_findings.rationale: A deterministic price jump plus always-true profit-target predicate proves both simulators record early_assignment_risk when both predicates can fire.

critic_findings.finding: The provider-inventory NEXT must not freeze unrelated open historical-proxy discovery if the inventory is empty or slow.
critic_findings.rationale: This is accepted as an orientation constraint but rejected as a code defect: merged-next-seed.md already permits a later zero-input wake to supersede the seed after a hard data block, and no strategy or symbol allowlist was added.

data_dependencies: Historical dividend events with both ex-date and honest announcement-time known_at provenance; required mode remains blocked on missing coverage.
Observed historical option surfaces remain required for evidence above L0.
Forward TSLL option archive remains one of three required distinct New York market dates.
next: Inventory no-paid historical corporate-action sources that supply both ex-date and honest announcement-time known_at; implement an archived DividendEventProvider only with non-fabricated provenance, otherwise write a fail-closed data decision packet and keep required-mode diagonal/bull-call simulations blocked.
